title: BTDR Stock Performance and Bitcoin Mining Profitability Concerns
text: Bitdeer Technologies (BTDR) stock has experienced significant volatility amid wider concerns about Bitcoin mining profitability. The company's stock has crashed 11.7% following Q1 2026 earnings results that missed expectations on earnings per share. Investors question whether traditional Bitcoin mining remains profitable given rising mining difficulty and power costs. Bitdeer addresses these concerns through its diversification strategy, particularly its expansion into AI cloud services and data center operations. The company's AI Cloud annualized recurring revenue reached $69 million by April 2026, providing a growth lever beyond traditional mining. The company's strategic pivot toward AI infrastructure appears to be addressing long-term mining profitability concerns by expanding into higher-margin AI services. Bitdeer's SEALMINER A4 hardware efficiency improvements also support mining viability by reducing power costs per terahash.
